models.code:
class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customer'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String(100), nullable=False)
    credit_limit = Column(Decimal, nullable=False)
    balance = Column(Decimal, nullable=False, default=0)
models.description: A class representing a customer, storing credit limit and balance.
models.name: Customer

models.code:
class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customer.id'), nullable=False)
    notes = Column(String(500))
    amount_total = Column(Decimal, default=0)
    date_shipped = Column(Date)
models.description: A class representing an order, includes a link to customer and notes.
models.name: Order

models.code:
class Item(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'item'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('order.id'), nullable=False)
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('product.id'), nullable=False)
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    unit_price = Column(Decimal, nullable=False)
    amount = Column(Decimal, nullable=False, default=0)
models.description: A class representing items within an order, referencing order and product.
models.name: Item

models.code:
class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'product'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String(100), nullable=False)
    unit_price = Column(Decimal, nullable=False)
models.description: A class representing products available for orders.
models.name: Product

rules.name: CustomerBalanceLessThanCreditLimit
rules.description: Ensure that a customer's balance does not exceed their credit limit.
rules.code:
Rule.constraint(validate=Customer,
                as_condition=lambda row: row.balance <= row.credit_limit,
                error_msg="Customer balance ({row.balance}) exceeds credit limit ({row.credit_limit})")

rules.name: CustomerBalanceSumOrderAmountTotal
rules.description: Derive the customer's balance as the sum of order amount_total where date_shipped is null.
rules.code: Rule.sum(derive=Customer.balance, as_sum_of=Order.amount_total, where=lambda row: row.date_shipped is None)

rules.name: OrderAmountTotalSumItemAmount
rules.description: Derive the order's amount_total as the sum of item amounts.

rules.name: ItemAmountAsQuantityTimesUnitPrice
rules.description: Calculate item amount as quantity multiplied by unit price.

rules.name: ItemUnitPriceCopyFromProduct
rules.description: Copy the item unit price from the product unit price.

rules.name: OrderToKafkaWhenShipped
rules.description: Send the order to a Kafka topic if date_shipped is not None.
rules.code:
Rule.after_flush_row_event(on_class=Order, calling=kafka_producer.send_row_to_kafka,
                               if_condition=lambda row: row.date_shipped is not None,
                               with_args={"topic": "order_shipping"})
